taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Backend Software Engineer
must_have_quals: Professional experience with at least one of the following programming languages, Golang, Python, JavaScript, C++, or Java, and a willingness to use Golang, Comfort and experience working within the constraints of existing software applications and architectures, Practical experience building web services and data pipelines at scale, Practical experience building services within a microservices architecture, Operational knowledge of relational, NoSQL and graph databases, Operational knowledge of messaging systems such as Kafka or Kinesis, Linux programming fundamentals, Experience with distributed and scalable systems, Experience with cloud native technologies, Experience with cloud observability tools
preferred_quals: You proactively seek to improve team productivity with automation, You have a passion for reliability and quality, You have a strong desire to continue to learn and grow, Experience with AWS, AZURE, GCP or OCI, Experience building with modern AI technologies, Experience building products in the security domain, Passion to mentor and help other grow, Experience doing high-level design and architecture
core_responsibilities: Take part in the design and implementation of new features and product enhancements that drive our mission, Work directly with Falcon Compete stakeholders to build products and systems that solve real world cybersecurity challenges, Design and implement reliable and performant solutions to enable continued scalability as we grow, Improve the effectiveness of service monitoring and proactively address issues, Write automation to reduce operational load within the team, Take part in on-call rotations to ensure high quality operations 24/7
job_summary: CrowdStrike is a global leader in cybersecurity, dedicated to stopping breaches through advanced AI-native platforms. The role involves developing and improving core systems to help security analysts detect, analyze, and remediate threats at scale.
